genre_refs: Charlotte Joan Sternberg folk-art painting ('Snowfall in the Village')
description: Reproduction of Charlotte Joan Sternberg's folk-art winter painting 'Snowfall in the Village,' posted by the Department of Labor as a Sunday and holiday-season greeting. The painted scene is a snowy New England town at dusk: a large decorated, lit Christmas tree stands at left in a snow-covered village green crisscrossed by roads; a horse-drawn sleigh and a horse-drawn carriage carry figures, children play and walk in red and dark winter coats, and a white-steepled church or clock-tower building and red colonial houses with glowing windows sit among bare trees and evergreens, with snow falling and wooded hills behind. The palette is cool blues, whites, and warm yellows from the windows with red accents. The artist's signature 'CHARLOTTE JOAN STERNBERG' is visible at lower left. There is no agency seal, slogan, or graphic overlay added. The tweet adds 'May God continue to bless our great Nation and her People'.
notable_text: (none added on image; artist signature 'Charlotte Joan Sternberg'; tweet titles it 'Snowfall in the Village')
